summary: Comprehensive testing of SSRTE (Système de Suivi et Remédiation du Travail des Enfants) Agent Dashboard. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend Dashboard loads correctly with all features working. Minor data display issues exist due to old seed data schema mismatch.

minor.issue: When cooperative user queries visits, visits with null cooperative_id are not returned. This is expected behavior but may confuse users.

ui_bugs.issue: Shows 'Invalid Date' for visits that have null or differently formatted date fields from old seed data
Missing Producteur names and household size for old seed data (shows empty values)

action_items: Consider migrating old ssrte_visits seed data to new schema (member_name, visit_date, household_size, risk_level)
Or add backward compatibility in API to map old fields (farmer_id → member_id, date_visite → visit_date, niveau_risque → risk_level)
critical_code_review_comments: SSRTE routes implement complete CLMRS (Child Labor Monitoring and Remediation System) workflow
Risk detection logic correctly identifies children at risk: works_on_farm AND (age < 15 OR not in_school)
All APIs properly verify SSRTE access via verify_ssrte_access() helper
Frontend Dashboard has proper data-testid attributes for testing

success_rate.frontend: 95% (Dashboard loads, tabs work, form opens - data display issue with old seed data)

seed_data_creation: Created test visits and cases via API (TEST_Child_* and TEST_Critical_* prefixed cases)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SSRTE system fully functional. Backend APIs: stats/overview, visits (list/create/detail), cases (list/create/detail), remediations, agents all working. Frontend Dashboard at /ssrte/dashboard shows stats, visits, cases tabs with new visit form modal. Old seed data in ssrte_visits collection uses different schema (farmer_id, date_visite, niveau_risque) vs new schema (member_id, visit_date, risk_level) causing display issues.

features_verified./api/ssrte/stats/overview: PASS - Returns visits, cases, remediations stats with rates
features_verified./api/ssrte/visits/create: PASS - Creates visit, detects children at risk, returns risk_level
features_verified./api/ssrte/cases/create: PASS - Creates case with severity classification
features_verified.Frontend Dashboard: PASS - Renders with stats cards, tabs, tables
features_verified.Frontend New Visit Form: PASS - Modal opens with all required fields

rca_of_the_issue: The 'Invalid Date' and missing data display issues in the Visits tab are caused by schema mismatch between old seed data (using farmer_id, date_visite, niveau_risque fields from ICI/SSRTE analytics module) and new SSRTE routes (expecting member_id, visit_date, risk_level). The API correctly returns the data, but old documents have null values for the expected fields. Solution: Either migrate old data or add field mapping in the list_visits API response.
